transcript: I don't think... she's going to answer.
Well, I don't know who you want.
Well, I'm calling from, uh, Guam right now.
I don't think you're callin' from Guam.
I am, and I don't know what time it is there, so you'll have to forgive me. I thought it was about nine o'clock in the evening.
[clears throat] But, uh... I'd like to talk about him.

Umm... it is my belief... and I intend to maintain this belief; that Harold Sacks... above all, stood for freedom. I'd like to add also, that, umm... people usually speak of Harold Sacks with a reverent tone. [sigh] One of admiration. That's really all I've got to... uh, really all I've got to offer on that. I was just more interested in what you had to say.
I don't know what you're talkin' about. To me, I think you're... had too much to drink, or something.
Yeah, Harold Sacks, I think, will take plastic.
Why don't you just... can you answer a couple of questions for me?
Well, what do you want to know?
Where is Harold Sacks? Where is Harry Sacks?
Well, there's no Harry Sacks here, or Harold Sacks.
I heard he sacked the 49ers pretty good.
H... how... what do you know, what can you tell me about Harry Sacks?
I don't know anything about Harry Sacks. I think you've got a... a problem.
All I did, was I called... 0-0, for the new, uh, toll free savings. And this is what happened.
Well, then you've got the wrong number.
I'm just after the savings, you know?
